code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut in_tok = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
      if is_ws
        if in_tok
          let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(v)
            let d = v * 2
            if first
              out = "#{d}"
              first = false
            else
              out = "#{out} #{d}"
            end
          when None
          end
          in_tok = false
        end
      else
        if not in_tok
          start = i
          in_tok = true
        end
      end
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_tok
    let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      let d = v * 2
      if first
        out = "#{d}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{d}"
      end
    when None
    end
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
